title: T-087 — audit_events.org_id nullable for unauthenticated security events + sentinel backfill (FT-027)
prompt:
# T-087 — audit_events.org_id nullable for unauthenticated security events + sentinel backfill (FT-027)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §11
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-027** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P2** (S effort)

## Goal
Make audit_events.org_id nullable; add `is_unauthenticated boolean not null default false` for clarity.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration 034 ALTER TABLE audit_events ALTER COLUMN org_id DROP NOT NULL.
2. ADD COLUMN is_unauthenticated boolean not null default false.
3. UPDATE rows where org_id matches the legacy '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' sentinel to org_id=NULL + is_unauthenticated=true.
4. Adjust RLS policy: rows with org_id IS NULL are visible only to service-role.
5. Test: app-role cannot SELECT NULL-org rows; service-role can.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/034-audit-events-org-id-nullable.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/audit-events-unauth.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 034 applied, when an INSERT with org_id=NULL + is_unauthenticated=true runs, then it succeeds.
2. Given an app-role SELECT, when run against NULL-org rows, then count is 0.
3. Given a service-role SELECT, when run against NULL-org rows, then count is correct.
4. Given the sentinel-backfill, when applied, then no rows remain with the all-zeros UUID.

## Test strategy
- RED: write audit-events-unauth.test.ts asserting RLS-NULL behavior before migration.
- Pin SQLSTATE for cross-row denials.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db migrate && pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test audit-events-unauth`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not relax RLS to expose NULL-org rows to app-role.
- Do not lose the sentinel rows during backfill (UPDATE, not DELETE).

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Make audit_events.org_id nullable to allow logging unauthenticated security events (pre-login probes, SCIM unknown-tenant); backfill existing rows with a sentinel.
pipeline_inputs.details: Today audit_events.org_id is NOT NULL which forces a fake-org log shim for security events that have no org context (cross-tenant SCIM probes, SAML failed assertions before tenant resolves). Drop NOT NULL and backfill any legacy shim rows with NULL via a marker column.
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 034 applied, when an INSERT with org_id=NULL + is_unauthenticated=true runs, then it succeeds.
Given an app-role SELECT, when run against NULL-org rows, then count is 0.
Given a service-role SELECT, when run against NULL-org rows, then count is correct.
Given the sentinel-backfill, when applied, then no rows remain with the all-zeros UUID.
test_strategy: RED: write audit-events-unauth.test.ts asserting RLS-NULL behavior before migration.
risk_red_lines: Do not relax RLS to expose NULL-org rows to app-role.
Do not lose the sentinel rows during backfill (UPDATE, not DELETE).
